agent.name: Practice Coach Agent
agent.description: Chat-first training agent that logs focused practice, keeps streak context current, and stores next-session plans.

template.name: Personal Practice Coach
template.description: A read-only training status dashboard backed by local SQLite and operated through chat/API writes.

secrets.name: APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Optional password for HTTP Basic Auth on /app and /app/api/*.

api.description: Read practice status or log a completed practice session.
Store a next-session plan for a practice goal.
